mainInfo.mainDescription: We offer innovative solar solutions for Moroccan homes, businesses, and farms. Our mission is to make clean energy accessible to everyone.
mainInfo.secondDescription: Solaria Energy is a Moroccan company specialized in the installation, maintenance, and design of custom solar systems.

services.desc: Complete solar panel installation for individual homes, with a personalized energy assessment.
Turnkey solutions to reduce your electricity costs in your offices or factories.
Solar pumps for irrigation, tailored to Moroccan farms.

products.name: 3KW Solar Kit
products.desc: Complete kit with inverter, panels, and batteries for domestic use.

products.name: 10KW Hybrid System
products.desc: Ideal for small and medium businesses and workshops with high energy consumption.

products.name: Submersible Solar Pump
products.desc: High-performance pump for agricultural irrigation, powered 100% by solar energy.

feedbacks.name: Ahmed El Mansouri
feedbacks.message: Fast service and a professional team. My system works perfectly.

feedbacks.name: Fatima Zahra
feedbacks.message: Excellent value for money. I highly recommend Solaria Energy.

values.name: Innovation
values.desc: We integrate the latest technologies to maximize energy performance.

values.name: Durability
values.desc: Our products are built to last and withstand Morocco's climate conditions.

values.name: Trust
values.desc: We build a relationship of trust with our clients, based on transparency.
